JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK JURY TRIAL CONT'D, ALL PARTIES, COUNSEL, 12 JURORS, AND 1 ALTERNATE PRESENT, WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED, EXHIBITS MOVED AND ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. CLOSING ARGUMENTS. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. BAILIFF SWORN, TOOK CHARGE OF THE JURY, JURY RETIRED TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICT. JURY RETURNED TO COURT, JURY REACHED A VERDICT, JURY FOUND THAT DEFT WAS NOT NEGLEGENT. JURY READ INTO THE RECORD. JURY POLLED AT PLTFS COUNSEL'S REQUEST. VERDICT WAS 10 YES AND 2 NO. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED, REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN, DEFT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
